description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a slightly domed top and bottom. The extinguisher features a prominent black hose attached near the top, which is flexible and ends in a conical nozzle. The top assembly includes a brass valve mechanism, a red handle, and a lever for operation, as well as a visible safety pin with a ring. The front of the extinguisher displays a white label with Cyrillic text and pictorial instructions, indicating its use in Russian-speaking regions. The surface is mostly smooth with a matte finish, and the overall build suggests durability and functionality for emergency use. The extinguisher is designed to be portable and easily accessible in urban environments such as garages, hallways, or public buildings.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, brass valve, red handle, and white instructional label in Cyrillic text. It has a smooth, matte metal surface and is designed for emergency use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white instructional label, black hose hanging down, and the safety pin with ring at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brass valve, red handle, and the black hose extending outward from the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain red cylindrical body with no visible label or hose details.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing both the label and the hose, as well as the top handle and valve assembly.
attribute_label_or_signage: White rectangular label with Cyrillic text and pictorial instructions on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Black flexible hose attached near the top, approximately half the height of the extinguisher, ending in a conical nozzle and hanging down the side.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: Metal safety pin with a circular ring visible at the top near the handle.
